summary: Daily Spin Bonus Wheel feature testing completed (Iteration 13). All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - Daily Spin shows as first game in casino, wheel displays all 6 reward segments correctly, button disabled after claiming with 'Come Back Tomorrow' message. All existing casino games still work.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/casino/daily-spin/status - Returns can_spin, rewards array, current_balance
Backend: Daily spin rewards match specification [1000, 5000, 15000, 35000, 80000, 200000]
Backend: POST /api/casino/daily-spin/claim - Returns 400 'Already claimed today' when already claimed
Backend: Daily spin status requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Daily spin claim requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: Status shows next_spin_time when already claimed
Backend: Slots endpoint still works after daily spin addition
Backend: Blackjack endpoint still works
Backend: Roulette endpoint still works
Backend: Wheel of Fortune endpoint still works
Backend: Casino stats endpoint still works
Backend: Casino history endpoint still works
Backend: Daily spin recorded in casino history with game_type='daily_spin'
Frontend: Casino page shows Daily Spin as FIRST game option
Frontend: All 8 games visible in casino lobby (daily, slots, blackjack, roulette, wheel, poker, baccarat, craps)
Frontend: Daily Spin wheel displays all 6 reward segments (1K, 5K, 15K, 35K, 80K, 200K)
Frontend: Daily Spin rewards preview shows all values (1,000 - 200,000)
Frontend: Button disabled and shows 'Come Back Tomorrow' after claiming
Frontend: 'Next spin available at midnight UTC' message displayed
Frontend: Balance synced correctly (13,087 BL)
Frontend: Games section shows Casino CTA banner
Frontend: All other casino games accessible (Slots, Blackjack, Roulette tested)
critical_code_review_comments: Daily Spin feature implemented correctly with all specified rewards [1000, 5000, 15000, 35000, 80000, 200000]
Once per day restriction working - resets at midnight UTC
Daily spin recorded in casino_history with bet_amount=0 and won_amount=reward
Frontend DailySpin component properly integrated into Casino.jsx
API endpoints added to frontend api.js: getDailySpinStatus, claimDailySpin
Games section shows Casino CTA banner linking to casino
All existing casino games unaffected by daily spin addition
Mobile files created but not testable in this environment (React Native needs Expo)
seed_data_creation: Daily spin claim recorded in casino_history
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Spin feature fully tested and working. User has already claimed today's spin (can_spin: false). Rewards are [1000, 5000, 15000, 35000, 80000, 200000] BL.
